playbook.intent: Cross-team coordination chaos -> live dependency graph + 24h blocker-surface SLA + no surprise releases.
playbook.scope: PM owns coordination across 3+ feature teams shipping into a shared product. This playbook sets up a maintained dependency graph, a scrum-of-scrums async cadence, integration-readiness gates, and release-readiness reviews. Done when two consecutive releases ship with zero surprise integration breaks and blockers surface within 24h of forming.

success-criteria.criterion: Dependency graph maintained and accurate within 1 day of any change
Cross-team blockers surface within 24h of forming
Two consecutive releases with zero surprise integration breaks

stage.name: Build dependency graph

tasks.task: Interview each team lead about upstream + downstream needs
Construct a directed dependency graph (issues + epics + services)
Publish to a shared, queryable surface

outputs.output: Dependency graph v1 in shared tool

stage.decision-gate: Advance when each team confirms their slice is accurate.

stage.name: Scrum-of-scrums async
stage.intent: Weekly cross-team sync without a meeting.

tasks.task: Stand up a weekly async thread for cross-team blockers
Standard prompts: blockers raised / blockers resolved / risks

stage.decision-gate: Advance after 2 consecutive weeks of full participation.

stage.name: Blocker SLA

tasks.task: Track blocker time-to-surface as a KPI

stage.decision-gate: Advance when median time-to-surface is <24h for 2 weeks.

stage.name: Integration-readiness gate
stage.intent: Nothing ships across teams without an integration check.

tasks.task: Define gate criteria: contract tests, schema check, feature flag
Require gate sign-off in PR template
Block merges on red gate state

stage.decision-gate: Advance after one full release cycle uses the gate.

stage.name: Release-readiness review
stage.intent: Pre-release review catches what the gate missed.

tasks.task: Each team lead signs their slice

stage.name: Refine the graph
stage.intent: Keep the graph live, not stale.

tasks.task: Pull dependencies out as new epics arrive

stage.decision-gate: Done when graph age never exceeds 1 day post-change.

extra.value: [Building the dependency graph once and never updating -> stale + ignored, Letting scrum-of-scrums become a status meeting -> participation drops, Skipping integration gate when timeline is tight -> surprise breaks]
['Can any team lead query the graph and trust the answer?', 'Are cross-team blockers visible within 24h?', 'Did the last 2 releases ship with zero surprise integration breaks?']

{human: faion get-content multi-team-coordination-dependency-graph-reasoning-p6-product --format md, agent: faion get-content multi-team-coordination-dependency-graph-reasoning-p6-product --format context, json: faion get-content multi-team-coordination-dependency-graph-reasoning-p6-product --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
